---
title: "Contact"
---

I use this page as the stable endpoint for short bio text, contact details, and external profiles.

## Short bio

Duojiang is building a research site that foregrounds questions, methods, and reusable outputs. The goal is a public record that stays clear, current, and easy to navigate.

## Add your public links

- Email: `your.email@example.com`
- GitHub: `https://github.com/your-handle`
- ORCID / Google Scholar / institutional profile: add the links you actively maintain

## What belongs on this page

- A one-paragraph bio
- A current CV or a link to one
- The simplest way to reach you
- External profiles that are worth keeping updated

::: {.note-box}
Replace the placeholder contact line before publishing publicly. Everything else on the page can stay fairly minimal.
:::
